title: Our Story: FTB Mods Theme
description: Modern FTB Mods UI from the Our Story collection. Clean design, custom icons, multilingual support.
body: ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_1a9d752d-1709-4f36-bdd9-1a0c73c5f86f.png) ## **Our Story: FTB Quest & Mod Theme** **A custom visual experience for FTB mods, built with style and immersion in mind.** Part of the _Our Story_ modpack collection, this resource pack overhauls the user interface of key FTB mods to offer a modern, minimalist and polished design. *** ## **🎨 Features** * ✨ Full GUI redesign for: * **FTB Quests** * **FTB Teams** * **FTB Library** * **FTB Filter System** * 🧭 Unique visual identity inspired by the _Our Story_ universe * 🌐 **Multilingual support** – works with both English and French Minecraft settings * 🎮 Designed for clarity, aesthetic cohesion, and enhanced readability * 🔁 Fully compatible with custom questlines, icons, and advanced modpack UIs *** ## **📦 Installation** This is a **resource pack**, not a modpack or datapack. To install: 1. Download the `.zip` file 2. Place it in your `resourcepacks` folder 3. Enable it in the Minecraft Resource Packs menu > For best results, pair it with a modpack using **FTB Quests** or any UI-heavy modpack. *** ## 🤝 Partnered with BisectHosting [Looking to play your modpack with friends on a reliable server?](https://bisecthosting.com/OurStory) **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/OurStory)** is the perfect choice for hosting your **Our Story** adventure — with 20+ global server locations and over 10 years of experience, they guarantee smooth, lag-free gameplay. ✨ Features: * Automated modpack setup & updates * 24/7 support * Instant setup * Affordable plans 🎁 **Use code `OurStory`** for **25% off** your first month as a new customer! > 🧭 Start your journey with ease — host your server with confidence. *** ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1258522/description_b048430d-3078-41d6-bb8c-8911c215411f.png) ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1258522/description_9252fc0f-e032-40db-b0f2-72c113f816b1.png) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1258522/description_4ac45a1d-7637-4e13-a4be-ca7cc7c7a1e7.png)
